references.title: Artificial Intelligence for Assessment and Feedback to Enhance Student Success in Higher Education

annotations.text: Paper seems to be a review about assessment strategies and how AI can be used to automate this task and improve student outcomes. The work starts with a review of assessment strategies, it seems, and follows up how AI can be used as part of them.
It also “tries to capture” an outline of ML algorithms used to support student success and discuss how assessments can be used to enhance learning outcomes.
